headline: HOOD Unveils Platinum Card: Will This Help Broaden Its Customer Base?
summary: Robinhood's invite-only Platinum Card packs a $695 fee, higher limits and luxury perks, aiming to win wealthier spenders and deepen in-app engagement.

headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Sees High-Teen Growth in Total Client Assets
summary: The Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE:SCHW) is one of the 15 best stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On February 13, The Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE:SCHW) reported total client assets of $12.2 trillion for January 2026, an 18% year-over-year increase. Core net new assets reached $27.8 billion, while new brokerage accounts grew 10% to 476,000. […]
